# Write-CanonFiles6.ps1 — Creates D1.5 discovery scripts for all 3 specs
# Run from: C:\Users\whale\git\uiao\tools\
# Usage:    powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\Write-CanonFiles6.ps1

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$repoRoot = "C:\Users\whale\git\uiao"

if (-not (Test-Path $repoRoot)) {
    Write-Error "Repo root not found: $repoRoot"
    return
}

$discoveryDir = Join-Path $repoRoot "tools\discovery"
if (-not (Test-Path $discoveryDir)) {
    New-Item -Path $discoveryDir -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
}

# --- Spec 1 D1.5 — Kerberos SPN Inventory ---
$b64_0 = ""

$path_0 = Join-Path $discoveryDir "Spec1-D1.5-Get-KerberosSPNInventory.ps1"
Write-Host "Writing Spec 1 D1.5 — Kerberos SPN Inventory..."
$bytes_0 = [System.Convert]::FromBase64String($b64_0)
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($path_0, $bytes_0)
Write-Host "  OK  $path_0" -ForegroundColor Green

# --- Spec 2 D1.5 — UPN Generation Rules Engine ---
$b64_1 = ""

$path_1 = Join-Path $discoveryDir "Spec2-D1.5-New-UPNGenerationRules.ps1"
Write-Host "Writing Spec 2 D1.5 — UPN Generation Rules Engine..."
$bytes_1 = [System.Convert]::FromBase64String($b64_1)
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($path_1, $bytes_1)
Write-Host "  OK  $path_1" -ForegroundColor Green

# --- Spec 3 D1.5 — COM+/DCOM Application Identity Audit ---
$b64_2 = ""

$path_2 = Join-Path $discoveryDir "Spec3-D1.5-Get-COMDCOMIdentityAudit.ps1"
Write-Host "Writing Spec 3 D1.5 — COM+/DCOM Application Identity Audit..."
$bytes_2 = [System.Convert]::FromBase64String($b64_2)
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($path_2, $bytes_2)
Write-Host "  OK  $path_2" -ForegroundColor Green


Write-Host ""
Write-Host "All 3 D1.5 scripts written. Now run:" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  cd C:\Users\whale\git\uiao"
Write-Host "  git add tools/discovery/Spec1-D1.5-Get-KerberosSPNInventory.ps1"
Write-Host "  git add tools/discovery/Spec2-D1.5-New-UPNGenerationRules.ps1"
Write-Host "  git add tools/discovery/Spec3-D1.5-Get-COMDCOMIdentityAudit.ps1"
Write-Host '  git commit -m "feat(discovery): add D1.5 scripts -- SPN inventory, UPN rules, COM/DCOM audit'
Write-Host ''
Write-Host '    - Spec1-D1.5: Kerberos SPN Inventory (6-pass, 24 service class migration maps)'
Write-Host '    - Spec2-D1.5: UPN Generation Rules Engine (transliteration, collision resolution)'
Write-Host '    - Spec3-D1.5: COM+/DCOM Application Identity Audit (5-pass, SDDL parsing)'
Write-Host ''
Write-Host '    Ref: UIAO_136 Phase 1, Deliverable D1.5"'
Write-Host "  git push origin main"
